summary: Awesome show captured from a soundboard source (video available), though reviewers give no specific audio quality details
review: Both reviewers rave about the performance, calling the show awesome and noting that video of the entire first set is accessible online. No explicit comments on the recording’s fidelity are provided, but the .sbd tag suggests a soundboard source.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers did not mention clarity, mix, or any sound issues; only a video of the first set is referenced.
